creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: dhn
Date: Tue Dec 17 18:30:47 2013
New Revision: 336751
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336751

Log:
  - Update to 0.5.3
  - Add manual
  - Add stage support of ports
  - Minor changes of Makefile
  
  PR:		ports/184261
  Submitted by:	Hung-Yi Chen <gaod@hychen.org>

Added:
  head/sysutils/ttyload/files/patch-ttyload.h   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/sysutils/ttyload/Makefile
  head/sysutils/ttyload/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/ttyload/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ttyload/Makefile	Tue Dec 17 18:19:46 2013	(r336750)
+++ head/sysutils/ttyload/Makefile	Tue Dec 17 18:30:47 2013	(r336751)
@@ -2,11 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ttyload
-PORTVERSION=	0.5.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.3
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.daveltd.com/src/util/ttyload/ \
-		http://mirror.mcx2.org/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.daveltd.com/src/util/ttyload/
 
 MAINTAINER=	dhn@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Give a color-coded graph of load averages over time
@@ -15,20 +13,17 @@ ALL_TARGET=	default
 
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/ttyload
-PORTDOCS=	*
-SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
+MAN1=	ttyload.1
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	@${ECHO_MSG} "Installing additional documentation to ${DOCSDIR}"
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${DOCSDIR}/README
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/LICENSE ${DOCSDIR}/LICENSE
-.endif
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-	@${ECHO_MSG} ""
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
-	@${ECHO_MSG} ""
+do-install:
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README.md ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/README
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/LICENSE ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/LICENSE
+.endif
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${MAN1} ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/sysutils/ttyload/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ttyload/distinfo	Tue Dec 17 18:19:46 2013	(r336750)
+++ head/sysutils/ttyload/distinfo	Tue Dec 17 18:30:47 2013	(r336751)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ttyload-0.5.2.tar.bz2) = 4783f6f44a59e554b0f31ab7940b9112123e8eef71b85d2cbad5d4275ba8dd44
-SIZE (ttyload-0.5.2.tar.bz2) = 14649
+SHA256 (ttyload-0.5.3.tar.bz2) = 7d3147b22530e6de865279aaad8b9e0348575379413ed1a2d410257baf92d783
+SIZE (ttyload-0.5.3.tar.bz2) = 15039

Added: head/sysutils/ttyload/files/patch-ttyload.h
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/ttyload/files/patch-ttyload.h	Tue Dec 17 18:30:47 2013	(r336751)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- ttyload.h.orig	2013-11-24 00:51:20.729533285 +0800
++++ ttyload.h	2013-11-24 00:51:29.900534853 +0800
+@@ -8,6 +8,8 @@
+  *
+  */
+ 
++#include <time.h>
++
+ #define	MIN(a,b)	(((a)<(b))?(a):(b))
+ #define	MAX(a,b)	(((a)>(b))?(a):(b))
+
